slides.title: Inspection that thinks like a senior engineer
slides.subtitle: GA today. Free tier live. Three integrations open.
slides.author: Mingjing AI · launch desk
slides.notes: Welcome. Today we GA. Three things to cover: what we built, who it's for, how to start using it in five minutes.

slides.title: Twelve minutes, five sections
items: The thinking, not just the feature list
slides.notes: Pacing: 2 minutes on personas, 4 minutes on the product, 3 minutes on the thinking, 1 minute on numbers, 2 minutes on QuickStart.

slides.title: The senior engineer's review queue is unbounded
slides.lead: Mingjing was designed for the people who currently absorb the cost of slow, manual reviews — not for greenfield projects with budget to hire more.

bullets.text: Senior backend leads doing 30+ PR reviews per week
Tech-debt focused teams with a 6-month migration backlog

bullets.note: needs audit trail, not just speed

slides.notes: We are NOT competing with Copilot. Copilot writes code. Mingjing reads it like a senior, the way a tech lead would on a Monday morning.

slides.title: Sentence-level rules vs trajectory-aware review

left.heading: Most linters / SAST
items: Drowns reviewer in noise (60% false positive)

right.heading: Mingjing
items: Reads PR + 6-week commit lineage + open issues
Detects 'this fix breaks the contract from PR #441'

slides.notes: The biggest insight: a senior engineer reviews a PR by remembering what happened last quarter. A linter has no memory. We gave the model memory.

slides.title: Beta numbers
slides.notes: Beta logos: Vercel, Linear, Sentry, four FinTechs we cannot name yet, two health-systems.

slides.quote: It caught a regression we would not have noticed for six weeks — and explained why, citing the PR that introduced the contract.
slides.author: Sara Chen

slides.title: From zero to first review in 5 minutes
slides.lead: Free tier covers personal repos and OSS up to 50 contributors. Paid plan starts at $99 / month / team.

bullets.text: CLI (any Git host): `pip install mingjing-cli && mingjing review HEAD`

slides.notes: Demo lives at mingjing.ai/demo — anyone can paste a PR URL and see a review in 8 seconds.

slides.title: Mingjing is live
slides.subtitle: Free tier open. Three integrations supported. Paid plans live at mingjing.ai/pricing.
slides.notes: Closing the loop: free tier is permanent for OSS + personal. We made the bet that the people who feel the pain most will become our biggest advocates.
